topNews.summary:

• Why it matters: This innovation could significantly reduce latency and improve performance in AI applications.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can leverage faster LLMs to enhance user experiences and develop more efficient AI-driven products.

Here's a quick demo of running it locally: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isKhAyivtfM . At Weave, we write most of our …
topNews.summary:
• What happened: A new model router was developed to optimize requests to coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor.  
• Why it matters: This innovation enhances efficiency by directing tasks to the most suitable AI model, improving performance.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can leverage this technology to streamline coding processes and reduce development time.

• Why it matters: This initiative simplifies the development of multi-robot systems, enhancing drone capabilities and accessibility.  
• Business opportunity: Companies can leverage this technology to innovate in sectors like logistics, agriculture, and surveillance with cost-effective drone solutions.

topStory.title: Show HN: Mcpify – Turn any REST API into an MCP server in one command

items.title: Show HN: Mcpify – Turn any REST API into an MCP server in one command
items.rawTextSnippet: Wiring an existing API into MCP means hand-writing a tool wrapper per endpoint. Almost every API has an OpenAPI spec, so mcpify just reads it and generates the whole server. Built it because I kept doing this by hand. Feedback welcome.

dailyBrief: Today's AI landscape is buzzing with significant developments. DSpark has introduced speculative decoding, which could enhance large language model (LLM) inference speeds, potentially reducing operational costs for businesses reliant on AI-driven applications. Meanwhile, the U.S. government is set to regulate access to GPT-5.6, a move that could reshape competitive dynamics in the AI sector and impact companies' innovation strategies. In Asia, startups are launching models similar to Mythos, as they navigate the challenges posed by Anthropic's export ban, indicating a shift in regional AI capabilities. Additionally, advancements in smart model routing within platforms like Claude, Codex, and Cursor promise to streamline workflows, enhancing productivity for tech professionals. These developments underscore the rapidly evolving AI ecosystem and its implications for business strategy and regulatory compliance.
